title: Agile Management for Machine Learning: A Systematic Mapping Study
author: Romao, Lucas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Zenodo repository provides the supplementary material for the article "Agile Management for Machine Learning: A Systematic Mapping Study", including the systematic mapping protocol, search strategies, list of included and excluded studies, data extraction form and raw data, aiming to ensure the transparency and reproducibility of the research on the intersection of agile management and Machine Learning projects.
steps_raw: This Zenodo repository provides the supplementary material for the article "Agile Management for Machine Learning: A Systematic Mapping Study", including the systematic mapping protocol, search strategies, list of included and excluded studies, data extraction form and raw data, aiming to ensure the transparency and reproducibility of the research on the intersection of agile management and Machine Learning projects.
